---
title: "GLEAM full scRNA-seq workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM full scRNA-seq workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8.2,
  fig.height = 5.8,
  out.width = "92%",
  dpi = 140
)

pkg_root <- if (file.exists("DESCRIPTION")) "." else if (file.exists(file.path("..", "DESCRIPTION"))) ".." else NULL
if (!is.null(pkg_root) && requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE)) {
  pkgload::load_all(pkg_root, export_all = FALSE, quiet = TRUE)
} else if (requireNamespace("GLEAM", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(GLEAM)
} else {
  stop("Need installed 'GLEAM' or package 'pkgload' to render this vignette.")
}
```

## 1) Load Seurat object and inspect starting state

```{r no-seurat-fallback, eval=!requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), echo=FALSE, fig.width=8.8, fig.height=6.2, out.width="96%"}
cat("Seurat is not available in this rendering environment. Showing representative pre-rendered figures.\n\n")
fig_root_candidates <- c("man/figures", "../man/figures", "../../man/figures")
fig_root <- fig_root_candidates[file.exists(fig_root_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(fig_root)) fig_root <- "man/figures"
knitr::include_graphics(c(
  file.path(fig_root, "embedding_signature_feature.png"),
  file.path(fig_root, "signature_dotbar_compare.png"),
  file.path(fig_root, "trajectory_signature_trend.png")
))
```

```{r scrna-load, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
library(Seurat)

ifnb_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")
if (ifnb_path == "") ifnb_path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds")
seu <- readRDS(ifnb_path)

if (ncol(seu) > 7000) {
  set.seed(123)
  keep <- sample(colnames(seu), size = 7000)
  seu <- subset(seu, cells = keep)
}

md <- seu@meta.data
meta_cols <- colnames(md)
sample_col <- if ("sample" %in% meta_cols) "sample" else if ("orig.ident" %in% meta_cols) "orig.ident" else NULL
group_col <- if ("stim" %in% meta_cols) "stim" else if ("group" %in% meta_cols) "group" else if (!is.null(sample_col)) sample_col else "group"
celltype_col <- if ("seurat_annotations" %in% meta_cols) "seurat_annotations" else if ("celltype" %in% meta_cols) "celltype" else "seurat_clusters"

if (is.null(sample_col)) {
  md$sample <- ifelse(seq_len(nrow(md)) <= nrow(md) / 2, "sample_A", "sample_B")
  sample_col <- "sample"
} else {
  md$sample <- as.character(md[[sample_col]])
}
if (!(group_col %in% colnames(md))) {
  md$group <- ifelse(seq_len(nrow(md)) <= nrow(md) / 2, "A", "B")
  group_col <- "group"
}
if (celltype_col == "seurat_clusters") {
  md$seurat_clusters <- as.character(md$seurat_clusters)
  md$celltype <- paste0("cluster_", md$seurat_clusters)
  celltype_col <- "celltype"
}
if (length(unique(as.character(md$sample))) < 2L) {
  md$sample <- ifelse(seq_len(nrow(md)) <= nrow(md) / 2, "sample_A", "sample_B")
}
if (length(unique(as.character(md[[group_col]]))) < 2L) {
  md$group <- ifelse(md$sample == unique(md$sample)[1], "A", "B")
  group_col <- "group"
}

celltype_levels <- names(sort(table(as.character(md[[celltype_col]])), decreasing = TRUE))
group_levels <- unique(as.character(md[[group_col]]))
group_levels <- group_levels[!is.na(group_levels) & nzchar(group_levels)]
if (length(group_levels) < 1L) group_levels <- c("A", "B")
md[[celltype_col]] <- factor(as.character(md[[celltype_col]]), levels = celltype_levels)
md[[group_col]] <- factor(as.character(md[[group_col]]), levels = group_levels)
md$sample <- as.character(md$sample)

pal_celltype <- setNames(get_palette("gleam_discrete", n = length(celltype_levels), continuous = FALSE), celltype_levels)
pal_group <- setNames(get_palette("brewer_set2", n = length(group_levels), continuous = FALSE), group_levels)

seu@meta.data <- md

if (!"pca" %in% names(seu@reductions)) {
  seu <- NormalizeData(seu, verbose = FALSE)
  seu <- FindVariableFeatures(seu, verbose = FALSE)
  seu <- ScaleData(seu, verbose = FALSE)
  seu <- RunPCA(seu, verbose = FALSE)
}
if (!"umap" %in% names(seu@reductions)) {
  seu <- FindNeighbors(seu, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
  seu <- FindClusters(seu, resolution = 0.5, verbose = FALSE)
  seu <- RunUMAP(seu, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
}
if (!"tsne" %in% names(seu@reductions)) {
  seu <- RunTSNE(seu, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
}

if (!"pseudotime" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data)) {
  seu$pseudotime <- rank(Embeddings(seu, "pca")[, 1], ties.method = "average") / ncol(seu)
}
if (!"lineage" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data)) {
  seu$lineage <- as.character(seu@meta.data[[celltype_col]])
}

dim(seu)
seu
head(seu@meta.data[, unique(c("sample", group_col, celltype_col, "pseudotime", "lineage")), drop = FALSE])
```

## 2) UMAP/tSNE overview before scoring

```{r scrna-umap-celltype, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = celltype_col, cols = pal_celltype, pt.size = 0.35) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "UMAP by cell type")
```

```{r scrna-umap-group, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = group_col, cols = pal_group, pt.size = 0.35) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "UMAP by group")
```

```{r scrna-tsne-group, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "tsne", group.by = group_col, cols = pal_group, pt.size = 0.35) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "tSNE by group")
```

## 3) Signature scoring

```{r scrna-score, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
gs <- NULL
for (sp in c("human", "mouse")) {
  gs_try <- try(get_geneset("hallmark", source = "builtin", species = sp), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(gs_try, "try-error")) next
  gs_try <- lapply(gs_try, function(g) intersect(unique(as.character(g)), rownames(seu)))
  gs_try <- gs_try[vapply(gs_try, length, integer(1)) >= 3L]
  if (length(gs_try) > 0L) {
    gs <- gs_try
    break
  }
}
if (is.null(gs) || length(gs) == 0L) {
  genes <- rownames(seu)
  k <- min(30L, length(genes))
  gs <- list(
    Signature_A = unique(genes[seq_len(k)]),
    Signature_B = unique(rev(genes)[seq_len(k)])
  )
}

sc <- score_signature(
  object = seu,
  geneset = gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data",
  slot = "data",
  method = "ensemble",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)
sc$meta[[celltype_col]] <- factor(as.character(sc$meta[[celltype_col]]), levels = celltype_levels)
sc$meta[[group_col]] <- factor(as.character(sc$meta[[group_col]]), levels = group_levels)
if ("lineage" %in% colnames(sc$meta)) {
  lineage_levels <- unique(as.character(sc$meta$lineage))
  lineage_levels <- lineage_levels[!is.na(lineage_levels) & nzchar(lineage_levels)]
  if (length(lineage_levels) < 1L) lineage_levels <- "lineage_1"
  sc$meta$lineage <- factor(as.character(sc$meta$lineage), levels = lineage_levels)
}
sc$meta$sample <- as.character(sc$meta$sample)

custom_gs <- list(IFN_custom = c("STAT1", "IRF1", "ISG15", "IFIT3", "CXCL10"))
sc_custom <- score_signature(
  object = seu,
  geneset = custom_gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  method = "mean",
  min_genes = 2,
  verbose = FALSE
)
```

## 4) Differential testing on signatures

```{r scrna-diff, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
res_pb <- test_signature(
  sc,
  group = group_col,
  sample = "sample",
  celltype = celltype_col,
  level = "pseudobulk",
  method = "wilcox"
)

top_sig <- res_pb$table$pathway[order(res_pb$table$p_adj)][1]
if (is.na(top_sig) || !nzchar(top_sig)) top_sig <- rownames(sc$score)[1]

top_sig
head(res_pb$table)
```

## 5) FeaturePlot-style signature map

```{r scrna-featureplot, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
sig_col <- paste0("GLEAM_signature_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_]+", "_", top_sig))
vals <- rep(NA_real_, ncol(seu))
names(vals) <- colnames(seu)
cells_in <- intersect(colnames(seu), colnames(sc$score))
vals[cells_in] <- as.numeric(sc$score[top_sig, cells_in])
seu[[sig_col]] <- vals

FeaturePlot(
  seu,
  features = sig_col,
  reduction = "umap",
  cols = get_palette("gleam_continuous", n = 128, continuous = TRUE),
  order = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.7
) + ggplot2::labs(title = paste0("FeaturePlot signature map: ", top_sig))
```

## 6) GLEAM plotting functions (consistent palettes)

```{r scrna-dotbar, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.8, fig.height=7.2, out.width="100%"}
plot_dot_bar(
  sc,
  by = c(group_col, celltype_col),
  pathway = top_sig,
  color_palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

```{r scrna-violin, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.2, fig.height=6.2}
plot_violin(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  group = celltype_col,
  palette = pal_celltype,
  point_size = 0,
  alpha = 0.75
) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1))
```

```{r scrna-split-violin, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.8, fig.height=6.4}
plot_split_violin(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  x = celltype_col,
  split.by = group_col,
  palette = pal_group,
  alpha = 0.72
) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1))
```

```{r scrna-ridge, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE) && requireNamespace("ggridges", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.8, fig.height=6.4}
plot_ridge(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  group = celltype_col,
  palette = pal_celltype,
  alpha = 0.75
)
```

## 7) Trajectory-aware visualization

```{r scrna-trajectory, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.8, fig.height=6.6}
lineage_levels <- unique(as.character(sc$meta$lineage))
lineage_levels <- lineage_levels[!is.na(lineage_levels) & nzchar(lineage_levels)]
if (length(lineage_levels) < 1L) lineage_levels <- "lineage_1"
pal_lineage <- setNames(get_palette("brewer_dark2", n = length(lineage_levels), continuous = FALSE), lineage_levels)

plot_pseudotime_score(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  pseudotime = "pseudotime",
  lineage = "lineage",
  palette = pal_lineage
)
```

```{r scrna-traj-map, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
plot_trajectory_score(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  object = seu,
  reduction = "umap",
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

## 8) Export tables

```{r scrna-export, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
long_tbl <- pivot_scores_long(sc)
summary_tbl <- summarize_scores(sc, by = c("sample", group_col), fun = "mean")
out_csv <- file.path(tempdir(), "gleam_scrna_scores.csv")
export_scores(sc, out_csv, format = "csv", include_meta = TRUE)

head(long_tbl)
head(summary_tbl)
out_csv
```
